overview: FinTrack is a mobile-first personal finance app that makes expense tracking simple and stress-free. It features a real-time spending dashboard, instant expense logging in under 3 taps, smart budgeting with category limits, and a motivational system with achievement badges and savings goals — all in a clean, calming design built for young professionals.
features: Instant expense logging — tap '+', enter amount, save in one tap
Real-time 'Money Left This Month' dashboard with pie chart
3-step budget setup wizard with per-category spending limits
Savings goals with visual progress tracking
Bottom navigation with Home, Add, Reports, Profile tabs
